ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the NLP task (e.g., POS, Chunking, NER) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of the NLP task (e.g., tagging, classification, extraction) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the task */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the task is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., academic, commercial) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is distributed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the dataset is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the NLP task */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model used for the evaluation */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was evaluated */,
  "num_configs" INTEGER /* Number of configurations evaluated */,
  "median_difference" REAL /* Median difference observed */,
  "percentile_95" REAL /* 95th percentile of the performance difference */,
  "max_difference" REAL /* Maximum difference observed */,
  "metrics_details" TEXT /* JSON or text field to store additional metrics (e.g., F1 score, precision, recall) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the performance metrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metrics */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the NLP task */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "config_details" TEXT /* Details about the configuration used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the configuration is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the metrics */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being reviewed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User comments and feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numeric rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when feedback was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)
